name: Synth Riders
summary:
New DLC Available for Purchase today!

For the first time in a VR rhythm game, enter the world of Barbie™ through an immersive musical Synth Riders Experience™! 

A world inspired by Barbie flows all around you while you play and dance to the rhythm. Soak in rays at the beach and groove at the roller disco while bopping along to K-pop hit, “Barbie Dreams (feat. Kaliii)” by FIFTY FIFTY from Barbie™ the Album.

About Synth Riders
